overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with blue hair and leopard-print jacket walking through a neon-drenched futuristic city street at night. The character navigates past towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements, crosses an intersection, and continues along the sidewalk while the camera periodically tilts up to emphasize the scale of the megastructures.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past various neon signs and storefronts

entered.detail: large orange neon sign reading TURBO on the right side of the street
tall building facade with prominent green neon lighting on the left side
towering futuristic skyscrapers with multiple holographic advertisements visible in the distance
futuristic street lamp with orange glowing light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a neon-lit sidewalk in a dense cyberpunk city, passing the prominent TURBO sign on the right. The street is lined with towering buildings covered in holographic advertisements, and a few pedestrians walk in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with yellow crosswalk markings

events.description: character steps onto the yellow crosswalk and begins crossing the street
camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers and narrow sky view between buildings

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection while looking up at the surrounding megastructures

notable_agents.action: black futuristic car drives past the crosswalk from left to right

entered.detail: wide intersection with yellow striped crosswalk markings
tall traffic signal pole with red light illuminated
elevated walkway or bridge connecting buildings high above the street

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wide intersection with yellow crosswalk markings as a black car passes by. The camera tilts upward to reveal the immense scale of the surrounding skyscrapers and overhead bridge structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with massive holographic advertisements

events.description: camera tilts upward again to focus on the large holographic billboard of a woman's face

agents.ego_description: walking along the opposite sidewalk while observing the towering holographic displays

entered.detail: massive holographic advertisement displaying a woman's face with white hair and cybernetic features
large billboard with NICOLA branding and cartoon character
concrete benches along the right side of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along the opposite sidewalk, the character passes by a massive holographic billboard of a cybernetic woman. The NICOLA advertisement is visible on the right, and the camera tilts up to emphasize the scale of the towering advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial street with multiple holographic billboards and storefronts

events.description: camera pans upward to show the full height of the surrounding skyscrapers and overhead structures

agents.ego_description: continuing down the neon-lit street while looking up at the architectural details and advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian sitting on bench near the storefront

entered.detail: small street vendor setup with display racks on the left sidewalk
enclosed pedestrian bridge connecting buildings high above the street level

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the dense commercial street, passing a street vendor stall and pedestrians sitting on benches. The camera pans upward to reveal overhead walkways and the full height of the surrounding megastructures covered in neon advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, neon-drenched commercial district that emphasizes the overwhelming scale of a futuristic megacity. It begins with the character walking along a sidewalk past a prominent TURBO sign and towering holographic advertisements. As the character crosses a wide intersection marked with yellow lines and a black car passes by, the camera tilts upward to reveal the immense height of the surrounding skyscrapers and overhead bridges. The scene then shifts to the opposite sidewalk, passing a massive holographic billboard of a cybernetic woman and a NICOLA advertisement before the camera tilts up once more to capture the verticality of the city. Finally, the movement continues past street vendor stalls and pedestrians on benches, with a final upward pan that exposes the network of overhead walkways and the full height of the neon-covered megastructures.
